title: Xreal XBX a01+ review: Astoundingly bright, lightweight AR glasses for $299 - Engadget
summary: Even at just 1080p, the a01+'s screen excels at video. It's just a shame that the Nintendo Switch 1 and 2 don't support display glasses like the XBX a01+.
